app.name: Goyama
app.tagline: Your pocket agronomist for Sri Lanka

home.subtitle: Know what grows where you are, and how to grow it well.

crops.title: Crops
crops.search_placeholder: Search crops, e.g. brinjal, vambatu, kathirikkai
crops.empty: No crops match your search yet.

map.title: Sri Lanka on one map
map.subtitle: Tap any spot to see which agro-ecological zone it's in and what grows well there.
map.legend_tap_hint: Tap a zone to explore crops
map.popup_off_zone: You tapped outside the agro-ecological zones.
map.popup_placeholder_note: Approximate boundaries — NRMC polygons coming soon.
map.geo_no_coverage: No administrative layer loaded for this point yet.
map.geo_disabled: Geo lookup is offline (server is in JSONL mode).
map.disclaimer: Zone boundaries on this map are sketchy hand-drawn approximations for the first UX pass. The canonical NRMC polygon dataset replaces them when the geospatial vectorisation workstream lands.

pathology.diseases_subtitle: Plant diseases reported in Sri Lanka with Sri Lanka-authoritative references.
pathology.pests_subtitle: Insect and arthropod pests affecting Sri Lankan crops.
pathology.remedies_subtitle: Management options — chemical, biological, cultural — with dosages and pre-harvest intervals where applicable.
pathology.empty_published: No records have cleared agronomist review yet. Check back as the review queue is processed.
pathology.chemical_warning: This is a chemical recommendation. Always follow label instructions, wear PPE, and respect the pre-harvest interval before harvest.

cultivation.heading: Cultivation calendar
cultivation.disclaimer: Draft guide — timings and inputs are sourced from DOA / HORDI publications and pending agronomist review.

markets.title: Wholesale prices
markets.subtitle: Daily commodity prices from Sri Lanka's Dedicated Economic Centres. Trend compares the latest observation to the day before.
markets.empty: No price observations have been imported yet for this market.
markets.disabled: Market price service is offline (server is in JSONL mode).
markets.disclaimer: Prices in LKR per kg. Source: HARTI Daily Wholesale Vegetable Price Bulletin. Verify against the source before using for transactions.

plan.heading: Cultivation plans
plan.week_no_details: No detailed activities recorded for this week.

knowledge.heading: Knowledge base
knowledge.subhead: Structured extracts from published agronomic sources, grouped by authority. DOA-official guidance ranks above cross-regional analogies; every chunk shows its origin.

authority.doa_official_tooltip: Validated by the Sri Lanka Department of Agriculture; may drive farmer recommendations.
authority.peer_reviewed_tooltip: Published in a peer-reviewed journal or institutional monograph.
authority.regional_authority_tooltip: From a regional agricultural authority (TNAU, ICAR, FAO). Apply with local judgement.
authority.practitioner_report_tooltip: Reported by a farmer or field practitioner. Use as advisory only.
authority.inferred_by_analogy_tooltip: Cross-applied from another region. Not yet validated locally — pilot before scaling.
authority.agent_synthesis_tooltip: Multi-source synthesis; triage only — not a recommendation.

errors.api_unreachable: Can't reach the Goyama service. Is it running on :8080?
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
